en.text: from a prolonged compound of the base of G2360; and a derivative of G0680 (meaning a noisy iambus, sung in honor of Bacchus); to make an acclamatory procession, i.e. (figuratively) to conquer or (by Hebraism) to give victory

senses.gloss_en: from a prolonged compound of the base of G2360; and a derivative of G0680 (meaning a noisy iambus, sung in honor of Bacchus); to make an acclamatory procession, i.e. (figuratively) to conquer or (by Hebraism) to give victory
